mapper.sql: j.id, j.subsidiary_id, j.job_category_id, j.title, j.company, j.city, j.category, j.type, j.business_line, j.province_code, j.city_code, j.work_mode, j.duration_type, j.internship_length, j.required_skills_json, j.tags, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.description, j.requirement, j.status, j.publish_time, j.create_time, j.update_time

j.id AS id, s.group_name AS groupName, s.id AS subsidiaryId, s.subsidiary_name AS subsidiaryName, s.short_name AS shortName, j.business_line AS businessLine, jc.id AS jobCategoryId, jc.category_name AS categoryName, j.province_code AS provinceCode, rp.name AS provinceName, j.city_code AS cityCode, rc.name AS cityName, j.work_mode AS workMode, j.duration_type AS durationType, j.internship_length AS internshipLength, j.title AS title, j.company AS company, j.city AS city, j.category AS category, j.type AS type, j.salary_min AS salaryMin, j.salary_max AS salaryMax, j.required_skills_json AS requiredSkillsJson, j.tags AS tags, j.description AS description, j.requirement AS requirement, j.status AS status, j.publish_time AS publishTime, j.create_time AS createTime, j.update_time AS updateTime

FROM job j INNER JOIN subsidiary_company s ON s.id = j.subsidiary_id INNER JOIN job_category jc ON jc.id = j.job_category_id INNER JOIN region_province rp ON rp.code = j.province_code INNER JOIN region_city rc ON rc.code = j.city_code

where.if: AND ( j.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.requirement LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.subsidiary_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR j.business_line LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND (rc.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%') OR j.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%'))
AND (jc.category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%') OR j.category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY j.salary_min ASC, j.publish_time DESC, j.id DESC
ORDER BY j.salary_max DESC, j.publish_time DESC, j.id DESC
ORDER BY j.publish_time DESC, j.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT FROM job j WHERE j.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO job ( subsidiary_id, job_category_id, title, company, city, category, type, business_line, province_code, city_code, work_mode, duration_type, internship_length, required_skills_json, tags, salary_min, salary_max, description, requirement, status, publish_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{subsidiaryId}, #{jobCategoryId}, #{title}, #{company}, #{city}, #{category}, #{type}, #{businessLine}, #{provinceCode}, #{cityCode}, #{workMode}, #{durationType}, #{internshipLength}, CAST(#{requiredSkillsJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{tags} AS JSON), #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{description}, #{requirement}, #{status},
NOW() NULL , NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE job SET subsidiary_id = #{subsidiaryId}, job_category_id = #{jobCategoryId}, title = #{title}, company = #{company}, city = #{city}, category = #{category}, type = #{type}, business_line = #{businessLine}, province_code = #{provinceCode}, city_code = #{cityCode}, work_mode = #{workMode}, duration_type = #{durationType}, internship_length = #{internshipLength}, required_skills_json = CAST(#{requiredSkillsJson} AS JSON), tags = CAST(#{tags} AS JSON), salary_min = #{salaryMin}, salary_max = #{salaryMax}, description = #{description}, requirement = #{requirement}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), publish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'OPEN' AND publish_time IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE publish_time END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE job SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), publish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'OPEN' AND publish_time IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE publish_time END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM job WHERE status = 'OPEN'

SELECT s.id AS subsidiaryId, s.subsidiary_name AS name, COUNT(1) AS value FROM job j INNER JOIN subsidiary_company s ON s.id = j.subsidiary_id GROUP BY s.id, s.subsidiary_name ORDER BY value DESC, s.sort_num ASC, s.id ASC
